locations.name: 巴布亞半島
locations.summary: 巴布亚半岛是巴布亚新几内亚的一个半岛，位于莱城东南。该半岛主体由欧文斯坦利山脉构成，拥有维多利亚山（4038米）等高峰。巴布亚新几内亚的首都及最大城市莫尔斯比港坐落于半岛南岸。 参考文献

relations.subject: Stephanie's astrapia
relations.evidence: Meyer]], 1886) }} Stephanie's astrapia (Astrapia stephaniae), also known as Princess Stephanie's astrapia, is a species of bird-of-paradise of the family Paradisaeidae, native to the Bird's Tail Peninsula (Papua New Guinea)
